title: T-057 — UI: TEC-090 D365 Field Mapping admin
prompt: Build D365 field mapping admin page per §13A. Field-level push/pull mapping configuration. Surfaces unmapped-field alerts (BL-TEC-01 Item.allergens[]). Match `d365_mapping_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:938-978. RED tests/ui/tec-090-d365-mapping.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-090-d365-mapping.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Admin mapping table + unmapped-field alert banner (BL-TEC-01).
pipeline_inputs.details: Mapping persisted via existing 02-SETTINGS reference_tables.d365_field_mappings (assumed). Alert banner per unmapped row + 'Acknowledge' button.
acceptance_criteria: Given the mapping page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:938-978, then table columns, unmapped-field banner, and Save button placement match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given allergens[] unmapped, when rendered, then BL-TEC-01 alert is shown.
Given non-admin user, when on page, then editing is disabled.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + alert behaviour.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow ad-hoc field name input — pick from contract registry.
